A0160.title: Code Audit and Bug Bounty
A0160.definition: Conduct multi-party audits and establish bug bounty programs to incentivize vulnerability discovery
A0160.description: Introduce internal code review, third-party security audits, public bug bounty programs, and continuous retesting before and after launch to encourage researchers to report issues in contract logic, permissions, asset flows, cross-chain interactions, and dependent components.
A0160.limitation: Audits and bug bounties cannot guarantee that all defects are found. Effectiveness depends on scope, depth, bounty incentives, and remediation follow-through, and business-logic changes require renewed assessment.
